message:
feat(codegen): Add type conversion helpers for anytype parameters

Add runtime helpers to properly handle type(x) patterns where type is
an anytype parameter holding a Zig type (i64 or f64):

- typeConvert(T, value) - Converts value to target type T
- typeConvertFloat(T, value) - Converts to target type, returns f64
- numericToFloat(value) - Converts any numeric value to f64

Update pow codegen to detect type conversion calls and use
typeConvertFloat for math operations. Also use numericToFloat
for variables of unknown numeric type.

Update calls.zig to emit runtime.builtins.typeConvert for calls
like type(i) where type is a type-like parameter name.

This fixes test_augassign, test_longexp, test_int_literal, and
test_assert which now pass completely.
